content.en:
Time flies.

After a period of time, the white-bearded old man completely stabilized the realm of the Eternal Master.

After that, he officially became an eternal master of the Eternal Temple in the Void Region, and obtained a portion of his resources.

The resource consumption of the Eternal Master is also very serious, so in order to improve their strength, the Eternal Master also needs to divide the territory, and all the resources that are beneficial to the Eternal Master are divided among them.

If one person achieves the Eternal Master, even if they become the Eternal Master, it will be very difficult at the beginning, so many resources are useless to them, and there is no way to get the resources that help the Eternal Master.

Fortunately, the old man with the white beard was lucky, although the Eternal Hall in the Void Region was not considered a powerful force in the Boundary River, it was not very weak, and he had the strength to obtain a lot of resources, so he didn't need to worry about resources at first.

......

Source Sea.

At this moment, Ye Tian was also cultivating.

He was using the resources of that treasure land to enhance his eternal will, and according to his expectations, there was no problem in ascending to the late eighth-order realm~

The other replica bodies use the secret of enlightenment to control the supreme legendary body, and the two divide their cultivation.

I have to say that the secret of enlightenment is too amazing, after a urge, Ye Tian seems to be at an extremely high-end level to comprehend low-end things, this is the manifestation of comprehension being promoted to the extreme.

However, the secret of enlightenment also continues to consume the power of the will, so it cannot be permanently urged, and the urge must be stopped for a period of time to restore the will.

However, even so, Ye Tian's progress in controlling the Supreme Legendary Body far exceeded before.

In the blink of an eye, thousands of boundary river years have passed.

this day.

Ye Tian's will had finally improved from the middle of the eighth order to the late eighth order, and his willpower had increased many times.

In addition, Ye Tian's Supreme Legendary Body was also controlled by him for nearly ninety, and after a while, he would be able to control ninety percent of the Supreme Legendary Body.

"It's progressing so fast!"

Ye Tian couldn't help but sigh.

If he didn't have the secret of enlightenment, he would not have been able to make the progress he has now, and he would definitely have stopped at the level of controlling the seventy percent supreme legendary body.

Even after another 100,000 realms of river years, this is still the case.

But now, his progress is incredible.

Thousands of years of river years have passed, and Ye Tian has finally completed a breakthrough and controlled ninety percent of the Supreme Legendary Body.

In terms of will, he can't make any more progress, and the resources that he obtained last time to improve his will have been exhausted.

It is indeed very difficult to ascend from the late will of the eighth order to the peak will of the eighth order, and many resources cannot help it improve, if you rely on your own slow penance, the difficulty will be even greater.

Therefore, in a short period of time, Ye Tian had no choice but to give up the improvement of his will power first, and concentrate on improving and controlling the Supreme Legendary Body.

He is now in control of ninety percent of the Supreme Legendary Body, and if he controls ten percent of the Supreme Legendary Body, his body will transform and condense into a Supreme Command Body.

This is a huge metamorphosis for him, so he must go all out to reach the realm of the Supreme Master.

Once the Supreme Master has been condensed, he is almost indistinguishable from the Eternal Master in terms of physique.

At the very least, his physical strength is comparable to that of the Eternal Master, and if he creates another top-notch space-time control technique and obtains another Realm Master, his strength will be extremely terrifying, and he may even hope to kill a weaker Eternal Master, thus completing the second test arranged by the Great Being.

"The matter of controlling the boundary soldiers also has to be upgraded, I don't know if the white-bearded old man can give some news. "

He contacted the old man with the white beard before, and asked the old man with the white beard to inquire if there was a way for the Eternal Controller to sell the creation of the Realm Soldier, or if there was an Eternal Controller to undertake the work of building the Realm Soldier.

He is not the Eternal Master, as he cannot participate in it, so he can only seek the help of the Eternal Master.

Although the half-tooth master had met him, he couldn't go to the half-tooth master for help, so he could only ask the more familiar white-bearded old man for help.

this day.

The white-bearded old man informed Ye Tian that the news of controlling the boundary soldiers was eyebrow-raising.

Void Zone.

Ye Tian saw the white-bearded old man, and at this moment, the white-bearded old man could already perfectly control his breath, and there would be no situation where he could not restrain his breath.

"White-bearded old man, is there any news?"

Ye Tian asked.

The white-bearded old man nodded: "I also want to create a Realm Control Soldier, so I kept inquiring, and finally I was introduced by the Qinglian Controller, and I met an Eternal Master, and the other party is an Eternal Controller who is proficient in building a Realm Control Soldier." However, it takes a long time to build a Realm Master, and there are many Eternal Masters who have made an appointment with him to create a Realm Master. Therefore, if you want to find the other party to create a master of the realm, you need to wait in line. "

"Is it feasible to buy the method and drawings and build it yourself?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Difficult!" said the white-bearded old man: "I have communicated with several Eternal Controllers, it is not easy to build a Realm Controller, any Eternal Controller who can build a Realm Soldier by himself has gone through countless years of building and failure, spent countless materials, and finally accumulated enough experience, if we go to build, it will take longer, it is not worth it." "

....... コ0...

"Then we have to wait!"

Ye Tian muttered.

The white-bearded old man said again: " There is also a way that does not need to wait, the eternal master urgently needs a material called the Five Elements Boundary Crystal, which is currently only occasionally born in the Five Elements Domain Sea of the Eleventh Boundary River, and the Five Elements Domain Sea is very chaotic, the rules there exclude the Eternal Controller, and the Five Elements Domain Sea is the place of the Eleventh Boundary River, we belong to the Thirteenth Boundary River, if our half-step Eternal Controller of the Thirteenth Boundary River is in the past, it is difficult to have any support, if the Five Elements Boundary Crystal is really discovered, if it is not strong enough, it is easy to fall. Moreover, what that Eternal Master needed was not a piece of the Five Elements Boundary Crystal, but at least hundreds of pieces. If you collect hundreds of Five Elements Boundary Crystals, you can ask him to create a Realm Control Soldier for you in advance, and it is free to build. "

"Five Elements Realm Crystal!"

Ye Tian hesitated for a moment, preparing to go to the Five Elements Domain Sea.

Strictly speaking, he'd never been to any other world.

Last time, he went to the end of the realm, and although he was out of the thirteenth boundary river, he didn't go to other boundary rivers either.

Therefore, he was still a little curious about going to other realms.

"Old man Whitebeard, I'm going to go to the Five Elements Domain Sea, but I'm a half-step eternal master, and I can't go to other boundary rivers, so I can only rely on you, Old Man Whitebeard. Ye Tian said.

The white-bearded old man immediately said, "Okay, I'll take you to the Eleventh Boundary River, but when you get there, everything can only rely on you, and I can't help you over there." "

"Understood!"

Ye Tianying said seven. _
